title: Fuel Route Drift Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool for calculating fuel consumption drift due to route deviations, based on ISO 14040, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC logistics standards.

inputs.label: Planned Route Distance
inputs.businessContext: Total distance of the planned route as per logistics plan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance of the planned route as per logistics plan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lojistik planına göre planlanan rotanın toplam mesafesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtentfernung der geplanten Route gemäß Logistikplan.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale de la route planifiée selon le plan logistique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia total de la ruta planificada según el plan logístico.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة الإجمالية للمسار المخطط وفقًا لخطة اللوجستيات.

inputs.label: Actual Route Distance
inputs.businessContext: Total distance actually driven, including deviations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance actually driven, including deviations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sapmalar dahil fiilen sürülen toplam mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale réellement parcourue, y compris les écarts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia total realmente recorrida, incluyendo desviaciones.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي المسافة المقطوعة فعليًا، بما في ذلك الانحرافات.

inputs.label: Average Fuel Consumption Rate
inputs.businessContext: Vehicle fuel consumption rate under standard conditions (ISO 14040).

label_i18n.fr: Taux de consommation moyen de carburant
label_i18n.es: Tasa media de consumo de combustible

businessContext_i18n.en: Vehicle fuel consumption rate under standard conditions (ISO 14040).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart koşullar altında (ISO 14040) araç yakıt tüketim oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de consommation de carburant du véhicule dans des conditions standard (ISO 14040).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de consumo de combustible del vehículo en condiciones estándar (ISO 14040).
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل استهلاك الوقود للمركبة في الظروف القياسية (ISO 14040).

inputs.label: Fuel Price per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of diesel or gasoline per liter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current market price of diesel or gasoline per liter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Litre başına dizel veya benzinin güncel piyasa fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Marktpreis für Diesel oder Benzin pro Liter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix actuel du marché du diesel ou de l'essence par litre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio actual de mercado del diésel o gasolina por litro.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر السوق الحالي للديزل أو البنزين لكل لتر.

inputs.label: Load Weight
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of cargo carried, affects fuel consumption.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of cargo carried, affects fuel consumption.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taşınan toplam yük ağırlığı, yakıt tüketimini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtgewicht der transportierten Ladung, beeinflusst den Kraftstoffverbrauch.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids total de la cargaison transportée, affecte la consommation de carburant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso total de la carga transportada, afecta el consumo de combustible.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوزن الإجمالي للبضائع المنقولة، يؤثر على استهلاك الوقود.

inputs.label: Terrain Type
inputs.businessContext: Terrain classification affecting fuel efficiency (WERC guidelines).

businessContext_i18n.en: Terrain classification affecting fuel efficiency (WERC guidelines).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıt verimliliğini etkileyen arazi sınıflandırması (WERC yönergeleri).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Classification du terrain affectant l'efficacité énergétique (directives WERC).
businessContext_i18n.es: Clasificación del terreno que afecta la eficiencia del combustible (directrices WERC).
businessContext_i18n.ar: تصنيف التضاريس المؤثر على كفاءة الوقود (إرشادات WERC).

inputs.label: Traffic Condition
inputs.businessContext: Traffic density impact on fuel consumption and route drift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Traffic density impact on fuel consumption and route drift.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıt tüketimi ve rota sapması üzerinde trafik yoğunluğu etkisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auswirkung der Verkehrsdichte auf Kraftstoffverbrauch und Routenabweichung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Impact de la densité du trafic sur la consommation de carburant et les écarts de route.
businessContext_i18n.es: Impacto de la densidad del tráfico en el consumo de combustible y la desviación de ruta.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تأثير كثافة المرور على استهلاك الوقود وانحراف المسار.

inputs.label: Driver Behavior Score
inputs.businessContext: Eco-driving score based on acceleration, braking, idling (Lean Six Sigma metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Eco-driving score based on acceleration, braking, idling (Lean Six Sigma metric).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hızlanma, frenleme, rölantiye dayalı eko-sürüş puanı (Yalın Altı Sigma metriği).
businessContext_i18n.de: Öko-Fahrbewertung basierend auf Beschleunigung, Bremsen, Leerlauf (Lean Six Sigma-Metrik).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score d'éco-conduite basé sur l'accélération, le freinage, le ralenti (métrique Lean Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación de conducción ecológica basada en aceleración, frenado, ralentí (métrica Lean Seis Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة القيادة البيئية بناءً على التسارع والفرملة والتوقف (مقياس اللين ستة سيجما).

rules.message: Actual distance must be greater than or equal to planned distance.
Fuel consumption rate must be between 0 and 100 L/100km.
Driver behavior score must be between 0 and 100.

thresholds.message: Route drift exceeds 15% — immediate review required.
Route drift between 10% and 15% — schedule optimization review.
Excess fuel cost exceeds $100 — investigate root cause.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
